summary: Crystal‑clear mix captures an all‑time great show – standout Shakedown Street, Bird Song and a soaring Scarlet > Fire with Jerry at his creative peak.
review: The recording is praised for its buttery, crisp sound that shines through high‑end headphones, suggesting a top‑quality source. Musically the concert is hailed as the best of the ’81 Greek run, with multiple fans calling out exceptional performances of Shakedown Street, Bird Song, Scarlet > Fire, El Paso and Jerry Garcia’s soaring guitar work. No notable flaws are mentioned, making both the audio and the show highly recommendable.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers give high marks (4‑5 stars) and lavish praise for the performance and sound; limited to two reviews, confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the mix as "butter" and note crystal‑clear, crisp playback on studio headphones – no complaints about noise or dropouts.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows with seamless segues (e.g., Scarlet > Fire, China Cat > Rider) and sustained jams that avoid "noodle land"; reviewers highlight strong transitions and a balanced mix of high‑energy rockers and exploratory passages.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as being at his creative peak with soaring guitar tones throughout the night.
